chk_alert_has_relation.name: chk_alert_has_relation
chk_alert_has_relation.value:
"alerts"."related_asset_id" IS NOT NULL
        OR "alerts"."related_cve_id" IS NOT NULL
        OR "alerts"."related_asset_vulnerability_id" IS NOT NULL
        OR "alerts"."related_scan_import_id" IS NOT NULL
        OR "alerts"."related_remediation_task_id" IS NOT NULL

chk_remediation_has_target.name: chk_remediation_has_target
chk_remediation_has_target.value: "remediation_tasks"."asset_vulnerability_id" IS NOT NULL OR "remediation_tasks"."cve_id" IS NOT NULL
